global_design_principles: Deep emerald/grass greens paired with obsidian blacks for a 'night stadium' vibe.
Data density via 'Control Room' grid for stats and matchday tables.
Tactical minimalism: 1px solid strokes or inner glow highlights over soft shadows.
Optical alignment and generous spacing to give breathing room to match data.

typography.guidelines: Never use Inter for headings. Keep letter-spacing extremely tight on big text to mimic sports broadcasting graphics.

layout_spacing.grid_system: Control Room Grid (Dense, Data Correlation). Base: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Gap: gap-4 or gap-6.
layout_spacing.padding_scale: Use generous internal padding for sections (p-8 to p-12). For data cards, use p-4 or p-6.
layout_spacing.bento_boxes: Use h-full on grid children to ensure strict rectangular alignment. No jagged bottoms.

buttons.primary: bg-[#10B981] text-[#050A05] font-bold hover:bg-[#34D399] transition-all rounded-md px-6 py-3 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(16,185,129,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#1A2E1A] text-white hover:border-[#10B981] hover:text-[#10B981] rounded-md transition-all
buttons.destructive: bg-transparent border border-red-500/30 text-red-500 hover:bg-red-500/10 rounded-md

cards.matchday: bg-[#111C11] border border-[#1A2E1A] rounded-lg p-4 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-[#10B981]/50 transition-all duration-300

inputs.base: bg-[#050A05] border border-[#1A2E1A] text-white focus:border-[#10B981] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#10B981] rounded-md rounded-md transition-all

roulette_animation.behavior: Fast vertical or horizontal scroll of team names, easing out over 3-5 seconds to land on the opponent.
roulette_animation.visuals: The active selection box must have a glowing 'Tracing Beam' border or solid #10B981 border with drop-shadow glow.

interactions_and_motion.page_transitions: Staggered fade-ins (0.1s delay per item) for lists and matchday cards using framer-motion.
interactions_and_motion.sounds: Use Web Audio API. Synthetic short 'tick' sounds for roulette spinning, and a digital 'success/whistle' synth chord when match is revealed.

initial_screen.description: Form to manually add exactly 11 teams.
elements: List of added teams with a remove icon.
Validation to ensure exactly 11 teams before proceeding.

draw_screen.description: The main action center for the tournament draw.

matchday_tables.layout: Bento grid displaying 6 matchdays. Each card represents a matchday.
matchday_tables.content: Shows 'Partido 1, Partido 2...' and explicitly 'Equipo que descansa' (Resting team) highlighted in a different color (e.g., text-gray-400).

metrics: List of teams that have already rested.

export.behavior: A prominent 'Exportar a PDF/Imagen' button using a library like html2canvas or jsPDF to capture the Matchday tables.

icons.usage: Use bold or duotone weights to match the athletic UI. Do not use thin icons.

stadium_bg.description: Night football stadium to be used as a heavily darkened, blurred background overlay (e.g., opacity-10) for the main application wrapper.

emerald_texture.description: Abstract emerald digital texture. Use for hero banners, active state backgrounds, or the roulette component background.

tournament_logo.description: Tournament emblem. Place in the top-left header or center of the initial entry screen.

testing_attributes.rule: ALL interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case representing their role.

technical_notes.react_files: Use .js or .jsx extensions. Do not use .tsx.
technical_notes.shadcn_customization: Modify Shadcn components directly in their files to map to the colors defined above. Strip out generic styles.
technical_notes.accessibility: Ensure contrast ratios pass on dark backgrounds. Focus rings must be visible.
